overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy action RPG showing a cloaked character with long blonde hair traversing a misty, snow-dusted mountain path. The character walks along rocky terrain beside a cliff wall, crosses a wooden bridge over a ravine, and enters a narrow canyon passage where a distant figure stands ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-dusted mountain path along rock cliff

events.description: wooden signpost comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: cloaked character with long blonde hair walking steadily along the mountain trail, fabric swaying with movement

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation running parallel to the path
narrow dirt trail with patches of snow and frost
scattered evergreen trees on the right slope
ancient stone archway visible in the distant mist
weathered wooden sign with directional markers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow mountain path bordered by a massive rock cliff on the left and open terrain on the right. The ground is dusted with snow, and pine trees dot the landscape. Ancient stone ruins are visible through the mist ahead, and a wooden signpost appears on the right as the path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with wooden bridge crossing

events.description: character ascends and crosses wooden bridge over a ravine

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening path, approaching and crossing a wooden bridge over a small ravine

entered.detail: rustic wooden plank bridge with simple railings spanning a ravine
narrow rocky gorge with water or mist at the bottom
simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the path
leafless gnarled tree trunk standing beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider valley with scattered trees and ancient ruins visible in the background. The character approaches a wooden bridge spanning a ravine, crosses it, and continues toward a narrowing passage ahead. The terrain becomes rockier as the canyon walls begin to close in.

events.description: entering narrow canyon passage between high rock walls
distant humanoid figure becomes visible standing in the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the shadowed canyon toward a figure standing in the distance ahead

notable_agents.action: standing still in the middle of the path ahead, facing toward the camera

entered.detail: tall sheer rock walls closing in on both sides of the path
humanoid silhouette standing in the canyon ahead
fallen or standing dead tree trunk beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow canyon passage where the sky is mostly obscured by rock overhangs, creating a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. The ground becomes rocky and uneven. Ahead, a distant figure stands motionless in the path, creating a focal point as the character continues walking through the winding canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snow-dusted mountain trail that gradually transitions from an open cliffside into a claustrophobic canyon. It begins with the character walking beside a massive rock wall and scattered pine trees, passing a wooden signpost as ancient stone ruins emerge through the mist. As the path opens into a wider valley, the camera follows the character across a wooden bridge spanning a deep ravine before the terrain becomes increasingly rocky. The scene then shifts as the landscape narrows, with towering canyon walls closing in to obscure the sky and create a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. Finally, the camera tracks forward through the winding, uneven passage toward a motionless figure standing in the distance.
